text:
jkois       2011-09-07 08:23:02 UTC

  FreeBSD doc repository

  Modified files:
    en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/eresources chapter.sgml 
    en_US.ISO8859-1/share/sgml mailing-lists.ent 
  Log:
  PR:     docs/160343
  
  Remove the now defunct mailinglist "freebsd-libh" from the documentation.
  
  The mailinglist archive will still be available, though.
  
  Requested by/patch provided by: David Wolfskill (david ett catwhisker dott org)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.211     +0 -6      doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/eresources/chapter.sgml
  1.82      +0 -4      doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/share/sgml/mailing-lists.ent
